definition: A relationship record uniquely identifying a customer entity within Enercare billing and service systems. Carries an account_number that is the customer-facing identifier on bills and portals.
The contracting party for one or more service accounts. May be a residential individual or a business entity.
The physical location where service is delivered. May be different from the billing address. Identified by service_address.
A billing relationship between a customer and a service or product. A customer may have multiple service accounts across utilities and products.
The first three characters of a Canadian postal code. Identifies a regional postal sortation area and is the minimum location-PII granularity used for marketing analytics.

term_name: Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act
definition: Federal Canadian privacy law that governs how private-sector organizations collect use and disclose personal information. Establishes consent withdrawal as a customer right.
Federal Canadian law requiring express consent for commercial electronic messages. Withdrawal must be honored within ten business days.
A recorded customer authorization to perform a specific data use defined by consent_type. Carries a legal_basis a granted_date and a withdrawn_date.
A formally logged customer grievance recorded against a service account or billing event. Regulator-reportable complaints carry a regulator_case_ref.
A work order created in response to a customer-reported issue or scheduled maintenance event.
Synonym for Service Request used in technician dispatch context.
A field employee assigned to fulfill service requests. Identified by employee_id and upn.
A territorial unit aligned to dispatch boundaries SLA targets and field supervision. Forms a parent-child hierarchy across Province > Region > Zone.
The percentage of customer interactions that are fully resolved during the first contact without follow-up. Calculated monthly on the call-center plane.
Average elapsed time from service request creation to completion. Reported per equipment type and per service zone.
A physical technician dispatch to a service address. Carries a cost-recovery impact and SLA window.
The contracted or policy-defined response and resolution targets per service-request priority and service zone.
The installed-base record of all furnaces water heaters and air conditioners under contract. Includes serial_number ownership_type and warranty_expiry.
A revenue agreement binding a customer to a recurring product. Carries auto_renew start_date end_date and monthly_amount.
The contract clause that extends the agreement at term end absent customer cancellation. Subject to Ontario Consumer Protection Act disclosure requirements.
Sum of monthly_amount across all active contracts at a given month boundary. Primary revenue metric for forecast and board reporting.
Monthly Recurring Revenue multiplied by 12.
Contract cancellations in a period divided by active contracts at the start of the period. Reported as monthly customer churn and revenue churn.
Billed revenue minus refunds credits and tax amounts. The revenue line used for management reporting.
The repeating period over which billing transactions are aggregated for a contract. Aligned to billing_frequency on the product record.
The regulator overseeing sub-metering distribution and utility-billing conduct in Ontario. Has reporting obligations for billing-conduct complaints.
The provincial law governing residential contract auto-renewal disclosure and cancellation rights. Reportable violations carry a regulator_case_ref.
Any object that stores transmits or processes primary account number data. PAN partials such as card_pan_last_4 remain in scope and carry handling restrictions.
The 9-digit Canadian government identifier issued to working residents. Highly Confidential when stored in full; partial last-4 is Confidential.
Any data point that alone or in combination can identify a natural person. Includes name email phone DOB SIN address.
Location data that identifies a person's residence or workplace. Coordinates beyond FSA precision are Confidential.
A formal customer request to receive or delete personal data held by Enercare. PIPEDA mandates response within thirty calendar days.
The rule defining how long a class of data is retained before purge. Customer financial records retained seven years; consent withdrawal records retained ten years.
The documented business reason for accessing a class of data. Drives access audit and downstream reporting in audit_data_access.
The record of who accessed what data when and for what purpose of use. Material for privacy incident investigation.
